isopleuros 1.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Function reference

Ternary plot

ternary_axis()
Add an Axis to a Ternary Plot
ternary_box()
Draw a Box around a Ternary Plot
ternary_grid()
Add Grid to a Ternary Plot
ternary_pairs()
Ternary Plot Matrices
ternary_plot()
Ternary Plot
ternary_title()
Ternary Plot Annotation

Geometries

ternary_arrows()
Add Arrows to a Ternary Plot
ternary_crosshairs()
Add Cross-Hairs to a Ternary Plot
ternary_labels()
Non-Overlapping Text Labels
ternary_lines()
Add Connected Line Segments to a Ternary Plot
ternary_points()
Add Points to a Ternary Plot
ternary_polygon()
Polygon Drawing
ternary_segments()
Add Line Segments to a Ternary Plot
ternary_text()
Add Text to a Ternary Plot

Statistical summaries

ternary_contour()
Contour Lines
ternary_density()
Density Contour Lines
ternary_ellipse() ternary_confidence() ternary_tolerance()
Add an Ellipse to a Ternary Plot
ternary_hull()
Convex Hull of a Set of Points
ternary_mean()
Compositional Mean
ternary_pca()
Principal Component Analysis

Ternary charts

triangle_phase_cas() triangle_phase_ceramic()
Ceramic Phase Diagram
triangle_soil_hypres() triangle_soil_folk() triangle_soil_shepard() triangle_soil_usda()
Soil Texture Triangle

Datasets

arctic
Arctic Lake Sediments Compositions
boxite
Boxite Compositions
lava
Skye Lavas Compositions

On this page

isopleuros is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau, , .

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
